ground_truth.title: Restaurants - Lebanon, PA
ground_truth.main_content: Member directory listing of restaurants in the Lebanon, PA area. The directory includes the following businesses: Ancestor Coffeehouse & Crêperie - 119 Springwood Dr., Suite 500, Lebanon, PA 17042 - Phone: 717-675-7527 - Website: ancestorcoffee.com - Passionate about providing friendly service and creating high quality drinks and crêpes. They prefer to source their ingredients locally when possible and make all drinks and crêpes to order. Owner: Rick Stammel. Categories: Restaurants, Coffeehouse. Blue Bird Inn - 2387 Cornwall Rd, Lebanon, PA 17042-8835 - Phone: 717-273-3000 - Website: www.bluebirdinn.com - Historical dining in a casual atmosphere. Award winning soups, distinctive sandwich and entree selections. Seasonal deck with extensive micro and European beer selections. President: Andrew Arnold. Categories: Restaurants, Taverns/Lounge. Chick-fil-A Lebanon Plaza - 1147 Quentin Rd, Lebanon, PA 17042 - Phone: 717-769-4040 - Website: https://www.chick-fil-a.com/locations/pa/lebanon-plaza. Categories: Restaurants - Fast Food or Pizza, Restaurants, Caterers. Country Fare Restaurant - 498 E Lincoln Ave, Myerstown, PA 17067-2213 - Phone: 717-866-9043 - Website: www.countryfarerestaurant.com. Owner: Eric Hoover. Categories: Restaurants, Bakeries, Banquet & Meeting Facilities, Fundraising. Gin Mill - 324 E Cumberland St, Lebanon, PA 17042-8128 - Phone: 717-273-2729 - Website: www.lebanonginmill.com. Categories: Restaurants, Taverns/Lounge, Caterers. Holiday Inn Harrisburg-Hershey - 604 Station Rd, Grantville, PA 17028-9155 - Phone: 717-469-0661 - Website: www.stayholiday.com. Categories: Hotels/Motels/Lodging, Restaurants, Conference Centers, Wedding Venue, Event Venue. Hollywood Casino at Penn National Race Course - 777 Hollywood Blvd, Grantville, PA 17028-9237 - Phone: 717-469-2211 - Website: www.hcpn.com. HCPN is the only place in Central PA combining the excitement of gaming and thoroughbred racing with dining entertainment, and accommodating service in a magnificent Hollywood setting. Categories: Casino, Horse Racing, Restaurants. LongHorn Steakhouse - 2125 Cumberland St, Lebanon, PA 17042 - Phone: 717-279-8370 - Website: www.longhousesteakhouse.com. Mick's All American Pub - Lebanon, PA area restaurant.
with: Ancestor Coffeehouse & Crêperie is passionate about providing friendly service and creating high quality drinks and crêpes.
Blue Bird Inn offers historical dining in a casual atmosphere with award winning soups and distinctive sandwich selections.
Hollywood Casino at Penn National Race Course combines gaming and thoroughbred racing with dining entertainment.
The directory includes restaurants such as Chick-fil-A Lebanon Plaza, Country Fare Restaurant, and Gin Mill.
Each listing provides contact information including phone number, address, and website for member businesses.
